title: The Shandia Join the Battle
description: The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Conis, Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Luffy. The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Look at the back of the boat!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Please use it as you wish!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The exit is the No.2 gate.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Ever since we left your house?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Yeah. Like you're afraid of something...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Cons-chan........ you must be worried about us....

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You know, your face looks kinda pale...

summary: The crew enters the dangerous forest of Upper Yard, where priests, beasts, and God’s judgment threaten every path.
